calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Apr-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of 336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Off Calendar
